title: Arthur Pendleton (Assistant)
content: You pull up Arthur's encrypted handle and send a direct message.||💬 Arthur: Look, I told the police everything I know. I'm just his research assistant. I don't want any trouble.

choices.text: Arthur, think about Thomas. Help me expose the people who did this to him.
I know about the burner phones, Arthur. Cooperate, or I'm giving your name to the police.
